query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.name, u.isSuperAdmin, u.workspaceRole,
       u.workspaceId, u.licenseNumber, u.licenseVerifiedAt, u.createdAt,
       w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.plan, w.subscriptionStatus,
       w.taxId, w.contactPhone, w.createdAt AS ws_created_at, w.subscriptionEndsAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspaceId
WHERE u.email = 'anathemell@gmail.com';

       w.taxId, w.contactPhone, w.createdAt AS ws_created_at, w.subscriptionEndsAt
